caption:
一首歌的诞生，始于一个想法，一段旋律，或是一句话。🎸

📢大家好！我们是多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会文娱股——第二十五届沁瓶子创作坊的创作组。我们把情绪揉进和弦，把故事写进歌词。我们不断尝试、打磨、推翻重来，只为写出那个最贴近心跳的版本。🧐

创作，是一段孤独的旅程，也是一段共同的冒险。当我们把灵感聚在一起，就能把感觉变成共鸣，把声音变成信念。🫵🏻❤️‍🔥

A song is born from a single idea likes a melody, a phrase, or a fleeting thought.🎸

📢Hey guys! We are the Creativity Division of the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Recreational Division —— 25th Fresh Bottle Composing Workshop. We weave emotions into chords and craft stories through lyrics. We revise, refine, and start over—again and again, just to create the version that resonates closest to the heart.🧐

Songwriting is both a solitary journey and a shared adventure. When our inspirations come together, we transform feelings into resonance and sound into conviction.🫵🏻❤️‍🔥

caption:
在舞台上，每一个旋律的诞生，都是表演组不断练习与配合的成果。🥁

📢大家好！我们是多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会文娱股——第二十五届沁瓶子创作坊的表演组。我们负责将音乐搬上舞台。从排练磨合到现场演出，音准、节奏、和声与默契，我们一遍又一遍打磨，只为呈现最真挚动人的表演。🤩

我们都热爱音乐，而表演，是我们最真切的表达方式。我们用身体感受节奏，用声音传递情感，把热忱化作旋律，让每一次演出都触动人心。💘🎵

Every captivating melody on stage is the result of our dedication, countless rehearsals and seamless teamwork.🥁

📢Hey guys! We are the Performance Division of the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Recreational Division —— 25th Fresh Bottle Composing Workshop. We are in charge of bringing music to life on stage. From rehearsals to live performances, we polish every detail likes pitch, rhythm, harmony, and chemistry —— again and again, just to present the most heartfelt performance.🤩

We are all deeply passionate about music, and performing is the truest way we express ourselves. We feel the rhythm through our bodies and convey emotion through our voices with passion turned into melody, we strive to make every performance resonate with the heart.💘🎵

caption:
一年一端午，一岁一安康✨

端午节又称龙舟节，落在每年农历五月初五。相信大家都听过屈原的传说吧！正是因为此传说，之后的每年农历五月初五就有了龙舟竞渡、吃粽子的习俗🐲。以此来纪念爱国诗人——屈原。

A year of Dragon Boat Festival, a year of wellbeing ✨

Dragon Boat Festival falls on the fifth day of the fifth month of the lunar calendar every year. All of us should ever heard of the legend of Qu Yuan! It is because of this legend, there is the custom of dragon boat racing and eating zongzi 🐲. This is to commemorate the patriotic poet - Qu Yuan.

caption:
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会文娱股爱心与康乐组例常活动 —— 《桌游轰趴》❣️

在来临的星期二（16/05/2023），我们将迎来这学期的第一场例常活动😍🤩！本次活动将与文化股旗下的戏剧班以及文学股旗下的棋艺班一同联办‼️ 这也是首次三大股联办例常活动，不容错过哟🥳！

本次例常的活动主题是《桌游轰趴》，很适合现阶段处于课业烦恼与期中考压力的你来玩乐并且放松身心🥰！

我们已为大家准备了各式各样的桌游，例如:
狼人杀 🐺
阿瓦隆 🧝🏻‍♀️
大富翁纸牌交易 🃏 

除了以上的桌游，届时也准备了棋艺游戏给大家来体验哟，包括麻将～🤩 我们不见不散❣️

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) Recreational Division Recreational and Care Group Weekly Activity — <Board Games Party Night> ❣️

On the upcoming Tuesday (16/05/2023), we will hold the first weekly activity of this semester 😍🤩! Also, we will collaborate with the Cultural Division of Drama Class and the Literature Division of Chess Class for this activity ‼️ This is the first time ever three divisions jointly organise a weekly activity, so you shouldn’t miss out 🥳!

This activity is themed as <Board Games Party Night>, and it’s a good chance for everyone who struggling with academic and mid-term tests to have fun and relax 🥰!

We have prepared a variety of board games including:
Werewolf 🐺
The Resistance : Avalon 🧝🏻‍♀️
Monopoly Deal Card 🃏

Besides board games, you can also try out some chess games consisting of mahjong ～🤩 See you soon❣️
